action_items.task: Ask Jordan about his criminal history (warrants, felony convictions).
action_items.context: PO requires screening of new associates due to probation conditions.

action_items.task: Do not allow Jordan to sleep over at the apartment.
action_items.context: Waiting for PO to clear Jordan regarding any criminal history or supervision status.

action_items.task: Bring certificate of completion for anger management classes.
action_items.context: Client has 3 sessions left; bringing the certificate will check off a major condition.

action_items.task: Request the morning off from work for the next appointment.
action_items.context: To ensure attendance for the next supervision meeting.

critical_updates.details: Client moved into her own apartment on Saturday. Deposit and first month's rent are fully paid.
Working at a warehouse. Currently receiving overtime which paid for housing, but client has budgeted for base 40 hours once holiday overtime ends.
Dating a new man named Jordan for three weeks. He works at a car dealership. They are not living together. Client has blocked abusive ex-partner Marcus and reports no contact.
Court fees are paid in full. Attending anger management classes consistently with 3 sessions remaining. No active no-contact orders applicable.

next_episode_context: Client is showing strong stability: she moved into her own apartment, maintains steady 40+ hour employment at a warehouse, and paid her court fees. She has 3 anger management sessions remaining and will bring the completion certificate next month. She recently started dating a man named Jordan; she has been instructed to inquire about his criminal history and prohibit sleepovers until he is cleared. She maintains strict no-contact with her ex, Marcus. The next appointment is scheduled for the 4th in the morning.
